description: Transitioning from day to night footwear is no more a question of worry on busy days. Enjoy a vintage look and modern comfort with the Arratoon oxford range of shoes from rockport. Designed for elegance and comfort, it is engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet, making it an absolute favourite for everyday wear. UpperFull-grain and suede leather upper for addednbsp; strength and durability and to retain the natural look of thenbsp; hideWingtip toe design and stylish perforated design for added sophisticationTraditional lace-up closure with padded collar for secure and comfortable FitPadded tongue and collar to help protect from excessivenbsp; rubbing and prevent blistersElongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug fit and added ventilationMidsoleMoulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long termnbsp; wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigueStrobel technology on the heel to provide cushionednbsp; comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm andnbsp; enhances support and flexibility to aid walkingOutsoleFlex grooves and circular lugs provide durable grip on various surfacesAdded support on inner arch of the foot for better supportLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigueMoisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impactWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
